# Happy Endpoint API Documentation

Happy Endpoint sells data APIs on RapidAPI. This documentation site contains API guides and statically generated endpoint reference pages for every OpenAPI operation.

Main guides:
- Getting Started: /welcome/
- Credits & Pricing: /credits/
- HTTP Status Codes: /status-codes/
- API Usage Guide: /usage/
- Global Parameters: /global-parameters/
- API Integration Best Practices: /best-practices/
- Error Handling: /error-handling/
- Timeouts: /timeouts/
- API Key Security: /api-keys/
- Glossary: /glossary/
- Support: /support/

API references:
- Sephora API: /sephora/
- Tesco API: /tesco/
- IKEA API: /ikea/
- PropertyFinder API: /propertyfinder/
- Bayut API: /bayut/
- Fotocasa API: /fotocasa/
- UAE Real Estate API: /uae-realestate/

Each API endpoint has its own canonical URL under /{api}/{endpoint}/.
